# nios_security_saml_authservice (Resource)

Manages an SAML Authservice.

## Example Usage

```terraform
// Create a SAML Authservice with Basic Fields
resource "nios_security_saml_authservice" "saml_authservice_with_basic_fields" {
  name = "saml_authservice"
  idp = {
    idp_type           = "OKTA"
    metadata_file_path = "<path-to-the-metadata-file>"
  }
}

//Create a SAML Authservice with Additional Fields
resource "nios_security_saml_authservice" "saml_authservice_with_additional_fields" {
  name    = "saml_authservice_2"
  comment = "Example SAML Authservice with Additional Fields"
  idp = {
    idp_type           = "OKTA"
    metadata_file_path = "<path-to-the-metadata-file>"
    groupname          = "group1"
    comment            = "IDP for SAML Authserv232ce"
    sso_redirect_url   = "2.2.2.2"
  }
  session_timeout = 120
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `idp` (Attributes) The SAML Identity Provider to use for authentication. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--idp))
- `name` (String) The name of the SAML authentication service.

### Optional

- `comment` (String) The descriptive comment for the SAML authentication service.
- `session_timeout` (Number) The session timeout in seconds.

### Read-Only

- `ref` (String) The reference to the object.

<a id="nestedatt--idp"></a>
### Nested Schema for `idp`

Required:

- `idp_type` (String) SAML Identity Provider type.

Optional:

- `comment` (String) The SAML Identity Provider descriptive comment.
- `groupname` (String) The SAML groupname optional user group attribute.
- `metadata_file_path` (String) The file path to the certificate.
- `metadata_url` (String) Identity Provider Metadata URL.
- `sso_redirect_url` (String) host name or IP address of the GM

Read-Only:

- `metadata_token` (String) The token returned by the uploadinit function call in object fileop.
